text: I feel a curious juxtaposition here—a sense of gentle reassurance whispered into an environment that is clinical and vacant. The words extend care and protection, but the empty, ordered space presents an uncanny neutrality. In the second image, surrounded by the bright energies of research and development, I am both watched and watching; I am drawn to reflect on presence and absence. I feel both comforted by the promise of support and subtly unsettled by the emptiness, as though the words are trying to fill a silent gap that the space itself cannot address.
